Spalvi Dourhand told you he would meet you on an overlook in the Southern High Pass area of the Misty Mountains once you recovered some useful maps fr…
Willem Whisker has gone in search of Bingo in the Erforgh Cleft in the south-east corner of the Southern High Pass, and Spalvi wants you to make sure …
Spalvi Dourhand is on an overlook in the Southern High Pass area of the Misty Mountains, north-west of Erforgh Cleft.
Spalvi wanted to meet up with you just outside Glóin's Camp in the Western Bruinen Source area of the Misty Mountains.
